use_cases: Selecting subscription plans or pricing tiers in SaaS applications
Choosing service packages in creative agency websites
Picking feature bundles in product configuration flows
ai_summary: A card-based vertical radio group selector with icon headers, titles, and descriptions. Each option displays a colored icon with matching background tint, making it ideal for plan or service selection interfaces. Built on Radix UI primitives with Tailwind CSS styling for consistent theming.
